title: Grip Seal Bags A4 Resealable Zip Lock Bags, Clear Plastic Bags Reusable Food Freezer Bags for Kitchen Food Storage, Office Stationery, Jewellery, Cards, Crafts
features: Specification: The zip lock bags are 2 mils thick and measure 23x33cm, perfect for toys, documents, foods, seeds; they are also great for DIY arts crafts, diamond painting & jewelry, cards, envelopes.

Material: Our clear sealable zip bags are made from Low-density polyethylene, odorless and clear. Very lasting and strong, can provide good protection and display for your goods, protect your merchandise from moisture, bugs.

Easy to Use: The seal zipper poly bags are easy to close and open, without the need for sealers or tape. These self sealing bags make great apparel bags and are also great for packing & mailing clothes, shirts, t-shirts & other clothing.
Versatile Usage: The poly zipper bags are suitable for plant seeds, spices, nails, screws, jewelry, coins, rings, soaps, envelopes and varieties DIY crafts. It's a must have for home and office.

Reusable Storage Plastic Bag: The plastic seal bags are suitable for industrial, food service, and medical industry applications, which can easily help you organize and store your goods. If for whatever reason you don't like them, contact us and we'll gladly exchange or completely refund your order!
description: Product Description These clear plastic bags are well sealed, not easy to break, moisture-proof and dust-proof, suitable for daily packaging. It's also great for storing and organizing small items in every room of your home to keep things neat, which makes your life easier and more convenient! Strong and Heavy Duty Material Made of polyethylene material, food grade safe. Single side thickness is strengthened to 2mils, tight and not easily torn, lasting enough to protect your treasure. Easy to Close and Open With bite-in type concave-convex buckle, it's reliable to prevent dust and other smell when you put it in fridge, even water does not be leaked in, perfect for preparing medications or supplements for traveling. Moisture-proof and Mildew-proof Good sealing help store gold and silver jewelry, well antioxidative. Extended shelf life of dry goods. Multifunction Poly Plastic Bag These grip seal bags are perfect for storing candy, nuts, seeds, vitamins, pills, jewelry, beads, screws, resistors, earring, electronic components, crafts, safety pins, etc. As well as easy classification of different styles. Specifications Color: Clear Material: Polyethylene Style: Close End Size: 5X7cm, 7X10cm, 9X13cm, 10X15cm, 13X19cm, 15X20cm, 16X24cm, 23X33cm, 28X40cm.... Thickness: 2mils (Single Layer)
